headline: Will Bunge Global (BG) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Bunge Global (BG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: From war to weather: A 'super El Niño' event poses fresh risks to global food costs
summary: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could take shape later this year, exacerbating global food security fears.
